violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Dates not put on RTE food in the walk-in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean in place equipment and in and around equipment needs more frequent cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood filters need cleaned.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
